title: Rhythm: home-row flow
description: Find your rhythm with home-row words
text: ask ask ask sad sad sad lad lad lad jak jak jak dad dad dad fall fall fall lass lass lass
tips: Each word repeated — focus on rhythm, not novelty
Enable metronome at 24 BPM — match your finger tempo
Don't speed up — find a steady beat

character_tips.anna: Repetition builds rhythm. The same word four times = muscle memory.
character_tips.maxim: Boring is gold for typing — repetition cements the path.
character_tips.klavochka: Like a song chorus, my dear — same notes, sweet rhythm 🎶
